bird.name: Chubb's cisticola
bird.summary: Chubb's cisticola (Cisticola chubbi) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is native to the Western High Plateau, the Alberti…

locations.name: 巴門達高原
locations.summary: 巴門達高原是非洲中西部國家喀麥隆的高原，受赤道多雨氣候影響，每年平均降雨量1,000至2,000毫米，是薩納加河主要支流的發源地。

locations.name: Albertine Rift montane forests

locations.name: East African montane forests
locations.summary: The East African montane forests is a montane tropical moist forest ecoregion of eastern Africa.

relations.subject: Chubb's cisticola
relations.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau, the Albertine Rift montane forests and the East African montane forests
